column1: This file was created using the 202602 CRSP database.
It contains value- and equal-weighted returns for portfolios formed on CF/P.
The portfolios are constructed at the end of June.  CF/P is cashflow (earnings
before extraordinary plus deferred tax income statement plus common equity's
share of depreciation) at the last fiscal year end of the prior calendar year
divided by ME at the end of December of the prior year.
Annual returns are from January to December.
Missing data are indicated by -99.99 or -999.
The break points include utilities and include financials.
The  portfolios  include utilities and include financials.
Value Weight Returns -- Annual from January to December
Equal Weight Returns -- Annual from January to December
Sum of CF     / Sum of ME
Value Weight Average of CF     / ME
